# FAOS Skills for Perplexity Computer

> Exported on 2026-03-13 | 520 skills

## Overview

This directory contains FAOS custom skills exported for use in Perplexity Computer.
Each skill is a self-contained directory with a `SKILL.md` file and optional supporting files (references, examples, assets, scripts).

## Installation

### Option 1: Upload Skills
1. Open Perplexity Computer (requires Max subscription, $200/month)
2. Upload `.md` skill files directly

### Option 2: Conversational Creation
1. Open Perplexity Computer
2. Paste skill content and ask Perplexity to save it as a skill

### Option 3: Agent API (Programmatic)
1. Use the Perplexity Agent API (`POST /v1/agent`)
2. Register custom functions from skill definitions

## Important Notes

- Perplexity handles all agent orchestration internally
- Skills with multi-agent instructions have been annotated with platform notes
- MCP integration is limited — prefer Agent API for custom tool integration
- Search components may not attend to skill instructions

## Source

These skills are exported from the [FAOS Agent Framework](https://github.com/frank-luongt/Foundation-AgenticOS)
using `scripts/export-skills.py`. The source of truth is `.faos/custom/skills/`.
